languages.text: "Трон Защищающий!" {n}Сенешаль с силой бьет мечом по консоли, но удар не оставляет ни царапины на проклятом металле. Абеляр, бормоча проклятия, бессильно опускает взгляд.{/n}
languages.translation_comment:
Абеляр в шоке
Анимация: бьет консоль

traits.locale_text: "Трон Защищающий!" {n}Сенешаль с силой бьет мечом по консоли, но удар не оставляет ни царапины на проклятом металле. Абеляр, бормоча проклятия, бессильно опускает взгляд.{/n}
traits.speaker: AbelardCompanion

languages.translation_comment:
Абеляр в шоке
Анимация: бьет консоль

languages.text: "Throne protect us!" {n}Abelard strikes a mighty blow with his sword against the console, but it leaves not a scratch on the accursed metal. Swearing under his breath, the Seneschal lowers his gaze in defeat.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Трон Защищающий!" {n}Сенешаль с силой бьет мечом по консоли, но удар не оставляет ни царапины на проклятом металле. Абеляр, бормоча проклятия, бессильно опускает взгляд.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Throne protect us!" {n}Abelard strikes a mighty blow with his sword against the console, but it leaves not a scratch on the accursed metal. Swearing under his breath, the Seneschal lowers his gaze in defeat.{/n}

[draft]"By the shielding Throne!" {n}Abelard strikes a mighty blow with his sword against the console, but it leaves not a scratch on the damnable metal. Muttering curses, your Seneschal lowers his gaze in defeat.{/n}

"Throne protect us!" {n}Abelard strikes a mighty blow with his sword against the console, but it leaves not a scratch on the accursed metal. Swearing under his breath, the Seneschal lowers his gaze in defeat.{/n}

"Throne protect us!" {n}Abelard strikes a mighty blow with his sword against the console, but it leaves not a scratch on the accursed metal. Swearing under his breath, the Seneschal lowers his gaze in defeat.{/n}

languages.text: “愿黄金王座庇佑我们！”{n}阿贝拉德挥剑狠狠斩向控制台，但那该死的金属连道划痕都没留下。总领低声咒骂着，挫败地垂下了目光。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Throne protect us!" {n}Abelard strikes a mighty blow with his sword against the console, but it leaves not a scratch on the accursed metal. Swearing under his breath, the Seneschal lowers his gaze in defeat.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “愿黄金王座庇佑我们！”{n}阿贝拉德挥剑狠狠斩向控制台，但那该死的金属连道划痕都没留下。总领低声咒骂着，挫败地垂下了目光。{/n}

languages.text: «¡Que el Trono nos proteja!». {n}Abelard lanza una poderosa estocada con su espada contra la consola, pero no deja ni una muesca en el metal maldito. Farfullando entre dientes, el Senescal agacha la mirada, derrotado.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Throne protect us!" {n}Abelard strikes a mighty blow with his sword against the console, but it leaves not a scratch on the accursed metal. Swearing under his breath, the Seneschal lowers his gaze in defeat.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¡Que el Trono nos proteja!». {n}Abelard lanza una poderosa estocada con su espada contra la consola, pero no deja ni una muesca en el metal maldito. Farfullando entre dientes, el Senescal agacha la mirada, derrotado.{/n}

languages.text: « Que le Trône nous garde ! » {n}Abélard porte un puissant coup d'épée sur la console, mais sa lame ne laisse pas même une éraflure sur le métal maudit. Jurant entre ses dents, le sénéchal vaincu baisse les yeux.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Throne protect us!" {n}Abelard strikes a mighty blow with his sword against the console, but it leaves not a scratch on the accursed metal. Swearing under his breath, the Seneschal lowers his gaze in defeat.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Que le Trône nous garde ! » {n}Abélard porte un puissant coup d'épée sur la console, mais sa lame ne laisse pas même une éraflure sur le métal maudit. Jurant entre ses dents, le sénéchal vaincu baisse les yeux.{/n}

languages.text: "Taht bizi korusun!" {n}Abelard, kılıcıyla konsola güçlü bir darbe indiriyor ancak lanetli metalde tek bir çizik bile bırakamıyor. Nefesinin altından küfreden Seneşal, yenilgiyle bakışlarını yere indiriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Throne protect us!" {n}Abelard strikes a mighty blow with his sword against the console, but it leaves not a scratch on the accursed metal. Swearing under his breath, the Seneschal lowers his gaze in defeat.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Taht bizi korusun!" {n}Abelard, kılıcıyla konsola güçlü bir darbe indiriyor ancak lanetli metalde tek bir çizik bile bırakamıyor. Nefesinin altından küfreden Seneşal, yenilgiyle bakışlarını yere indiriyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Der Thron steh uns bei!" {n}Abelard fügt der Konsole mit seinem Schwert einen mächtigen Hieb zu, hinterlässt auf dem verfluchten Metall aber keinen Kratzer. Der Truchsess stößt einen unterdrücken Fluch aus und senkt geschlagen den Kopf.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Throne protect us!" {n}Abelard strikes a mighty blow with his sword against the console, but it leaves not a scratch on the accursed metal. Swearing under his breath, the Seneschal lowers his gaze in defeat.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Der Thron steh uns bei!" {n}Abelard fügt der Konsole mit seinem Schwert einen mächtigen Hieb zu, hinterlässt auf dem verfluchten Metall aber keinen Kratzer. Der Truchsess stößt einen unterdrücken Fluch aus und senkt geschlagen den Kopf.{/n}

languages.text: 「王座よ、我らを護れ！」{n}アベラードは剣を振りかざし、王座に猛烈な一撃を放つ。しかし、呪われた金属には傷一つも付かない。息を潜めて呪うアベラードは、敗北を悟り、視線を下ろす。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Throne protect us!" {n}Abelard strikes a mighty blow with his sword against the console, but it leaves not a scratch on the accursed metal. Swearing under his breath, the Seneschal lowers his gaze in defeat.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「王座よ、我らを護れ！」{n}アベラードは剣を振りかざし、王座に猛烈な一撃を放つ。しかし、呪われた金属には傷一つも付かない。息を潜めて呪うアベラードは、敗北を悟り、視線を下ろす。{/n}
